name: Next Right Thing
description: Hook-based OpenClaw adapter for the Next Right Thing protocol.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: Approval timeout in milliseconds for guarded tool calls.

enabled.description: Enable the built-in reflective deliberation on finalize (default true).

reviewRoles.description: Extra review lenses to include in the contemplation.

maxAttempts.description: How many times to ask the model to reflect before finalizing (default 1).

enforce.description: Fail closed before model inference when the run is not on a hook-covered runtime.

allowUnidentifiedRuntime.description: Allow runs whose runtime/provider identity is not exposed to before_agent_run.

blockedRuntimeIds.description: Runtime ids to block because their native tools bypass before_tool_call.

blockedProviderIds.description: Provider ids to block because their native tools bypass before_tool_call.

message.description: Optional user-facing block message for uncovered runtime paths.
